content: Existing Self-Refine frameworks can be fundamentally upgraded by integrating multiple inconsistent perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a multi-perspective iterative self-refinement framework that retains Self-Refine's key advantage of requiring no extra supervised training or external data. This hybrid approach solves the common flaw of single-perspective self-refinement getting stuck in local feedback loops where the LLM cannot recognize its own blind spots in initial outputs.
